Data Overview
Live · Comparing May 2026 (MTD) vs same period 2025
19 days · 19 days · 1:1 day match
Quick slices
Active filtersClear all
M
Data · Comparison insights
High confidenceYoY · May 2026 vs May 2025Synced 4 min ago
Conversion lift
CR up 96.8% YoY — welcome flow refresh on May 3rd drove most of it
Conversion went from 2.8% to 5.5%. New welcome flow alone accounts for 71% of the lift; the rest split between paid creative refresh and improved Klaviyo deliverability.
Cohort momentum
Customer LTV up 23.1% — VIP cohort doubled YoY
$8,920 average LTV, up from $7,247. VIP cohort (5+ orders) grew from 142 to 287 customers in 12 months. Repeat purchase rate now 34% vs 26% same period last year.
Traffic decay
Unique visitors down 8.2% — organic search down 14%
Conversion is masking the traffic problem. Organic search visitors down 14% YoY, ranking on 4 key terms lost. Paid is filling the gap but CPA is rising. Worth addressing before holiday.

+18.4%
vs prior year
What's driving thisWelcome flow refresh on May 3 drove most of the lift (71%). Premium SKU mix shifted from 28% to 42% of orders. Klaviyo deliverability gains added another 11%.
